subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-Ḥasan! Should the True One, glorified be His majesty, utter but a single word concerning any soul, verily that soul would [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل حسن حق جل جلاله اگر بیک حرف درباره نفسی نطق نماید البته او را
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @thankfulness; gratitude
